acceptance.assertion: Only the verified pre-scenario Chromium/MapLibre fragment-shader compilation startup signature is classified as retryable; unrelated console errors, page errors, assertion failures and post-start failures remain terminal.
The browser-smoke runner performs at most one fresh browser retry for the exact retryable startup signature and records both attempts; no unbounded or generic retry loop is introduced.
A repeated shader startup failure and every non-classified failure still fail the smoke command and CI with explicit diagnostic evidence.
Focused automated tests cover retryable-signature detection, non-retryable failures, one-retry success and retry exhaustion without depending on a naturally occurring GPU flake.
The full Commonworld browser-smoke suite passes after the hardening and continues to exercise intent search, map and layer journeys, representative device viewports and accessibility paths.
Closeout binds the exact implementation diff and head, green required CI and the resulting merge commit; it explicitly does not claim that Chromium or GPU shader compilation can never fail.

approval.note: Follow-up from Commonworld PR #134 validation. Retry logic must be narrowly signature-bound and bounded; it must not mask product regressions or general browser failures.

goal: Make Commonworld browser-smoke execution resilient to the specifically observed intermittent Chromium/MapLibre fragment-shader compilation failure at browser startup, while remaining fail-closed for genuine application, assertion, navigation and rendering failures.

does_not_establish: a generic right to retry browser failures
that every shader compilation error is transient
that application rendering failures may be ignored
a Chromium or MapLibre upstream root-cause fix
metadata.observed_limit: Repeated unchanged public browser-smoke runs intermittently failed before scenario start with a Chromium/MapLibre fragment-shader compile error, while later unchanged retries completed the entire smoke suite.

title: Harden browser smoke against transient Chromium shader startup failures
